case_title: DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS VS MENDOZA, ELIZABETH MARIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ELIZABETH MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ELIZABETH MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-08-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-14-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 11/14/01 AT 10AM AND COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ELIZABETH MARIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
